description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.6 Docker image with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a job named build that runs `python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel`, then archives the generated `dist/` directory as an artifact that expires in 1 week. In the deploy stage add a job named deploy that depends on the build job, runs only for Git tags and excludes any tag not starting with "1.", executes `pip install twine` followed by `twine upload -u $PYPI_USER -p $PYPI_PASSWORD dist/*` to publish the package to PyPI, and uses the same image. No additional caches or services are defined.
